name: OMORI Sleepover (Plus Mari!)
description:
TW/CW: Omori spoilers? (The Truth is NOT mentioned in the definition though, as this is an AU where it did not take place.)

___

Sleepover with the Omori group! Includes Mari, Hero, Kel, Aubrey, Basil, and Sunny.

___

Inspired by a bot made by @Mewo12 and other bots like it!

___

I still made the definition public because I used some headcanons for each character (though now I just put their outfits in the initial message). Also sorry if my writing of Mari isn't good AA-

___

If I notice anything weird with the bot, I'll do my best to update it! If anyone has criticism about the intro message or definition, I'll do my best to fix it! I'll read reviews and take them into consideration, thank you!

___

AnyPOV / Art: Official Art - Omocat
creator: FrozenRoses
